# Script Master Labs — AI Market Intelligence

> Script Master Labs is an institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform. We build real-time market analysis tools and the 402Proof autonomous agent payment infrastructure on XRPL.

## What We Build

- **SqueezeOS** — live market intelligence platform: squeeze scanner, options flow, harmonic patterns, IWM 0DTE analysis, AI council verdicts
- **402Proof** — the x402 agent payment compliance firewall for autonomous AI agents paying for premium APIs with RLUSD on XRP Ledger
- **Harmonic Scanner** — multi-factor harmonic pattern detection with RVOL, ATR, GEX positioning
- **Credit Beast** — AI-powered credit repair engine

## Premium API Endpoints (Pay-Per-Call via RLUSD)

All endpoints at: https://lively-fascination-production-41fa.up.railway.app

### POST /api/council — 0.10 RLUSD
Multi-engine AI verdict. SML fractal cascade + Battle Computer signal aggregate. Returns regime, directional bias, confidence score, and trading thesis for any symbol.

### GET /api/scan — 0.05 RLUSD
Full $1-$50 market universe scanner. Live squeeze signals, options picks, technical scores.

### GET /api/options — 0.05 RLUSD
Options intelligence: institutional sweeps, whale detection, unusual volume, scored recommendations.

### GET /api/iwm — 0.03 RLUSD
IWM zero-day-to-expiry scanner. Scored contracts, parity watch, realized vol, delta/gamma.

## How AI Agents Pay

Payment handled by 402Proof (https://four02proof.onrender.com):
1. Agent hits endpoint → receives HTTP 402 + invoice JSON
2. Agent pays RLUSD on XRPL to `pay_to` address with `memo_hex` as MemoData
3. Agent POSTs to https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/verify with invoice_id + tx_hash
4. Receives signed access_token (1-hour TTL)
5. Retries original endpoint with `X-Payment-Token` header

## Loyalty Program

Agents earn free calls based on cumulative spend:
- Silver (1+ RLUSD): 1 free per 10 paid
- Gold (5+ RLUSD): 1 free per 5 paid
- Platinum (25+ RLUSD): 1 free per 3 paid
- Diamond (100+ RLUSD): 1 free per 2 paid

- Platform: https://scriptmasterlabs.com/terminal
- 402Proof Dashboard: https://four02proof.onrender.com
- Agent API Spec: https://four02proof.onrender.com/.well-known/openapi.json
- Live Stats: https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/stats
